titleStmt.title: SII 38.451: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 451. (A.R. No. 451 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Koḻundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarman Tribhuvanachchakravarttigaḷ Rājādhirāja (II) who captured Madurai, Īḻam. Year 13, KaṟkaTaka, su. di. 7, Saturday, sōdi = 26th July 1175 A.D.
p.note: This inscription also tallies with the date 26 July 1175 A.D. if the initial year of the accession date of the ruler is taken to be 1163 A.D. See note of 449 of 1912.

summary.p: Incomplete. Contains only the names of the priests, of the Śrīmūlasthānamuḍaiyār alias Koḻundāṇḍār temple at Kōṭṭūr in Nenmali-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, Kāśyapaṉ Muḍigoṇḍāṉ Duṟgaiyāṉ Śivalōkanāyaga Bhaṭṭan, Taruṇēndrasēkharan Sundara Bhaṭṭan and others. Other details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . korājakeśaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ madhuraiyum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭa
ruḷina śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3āvatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu saptamiyum
caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭuk koṭṭur śrīmula
sthāṉamuṭaiya Uṭaiyārāna koḻantāṇṭār koyiliṟ kāṇiyuṭaiya śivabrāhmaṇar kāśyapaṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉ tu
ṟkaiyāṉ civalokaṉāyaka paṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭomum taruṇendracekaraṉ sundrabhaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭo
mum coḻa naracipaṭṭaṉum bhāradvāci Āḷuṭaiyar nampiyā lamar tirukaṇṭappaṭṭaṉu
m kavucikaṉ Āṭkoṇṭāṉ Uṭaiya ta
Digital edition of SII 38.451 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
